beliefs.belief: Consistent physical activity and challenge lead to tangible self-improvement and satisfaction.
beliefs.evidence: I did a mix of cardio and strength training... I want to improve my time from last year.

beliefs.belief: Maintaining boundaries between work and personal life is necessary for well-being.
beliefs.evidence: I’ve been setting firm boundaries for my work hours. I also block off time for myself to relax and unwind.

beliefs.belief: Engaging in hands-on, natural activities provides deep satisfaction and relaxation.
beliefs.evidence: Watching them grow is so satisfying! ...It’s therapeutic!

beliefs.belief: Social support and friendly competition enhance enjoyment and performance in activities.
beliefs.evidence: I like to run with a friend sometimes. We push each other, and it’s much more fun that way!

beliefs.belief: Time spent with family, especially younger relatives, is highly valuable and joyful.
beliefs.evidence: Just some quality time with my grandchildren! We’re planning to play some board games together.

beliefs.belief: I am capable of setting increasingly difficult goals and achieving them.
beliefs.evidence: I'm thinking of training for a half marathon! It sounds challenging, but exhilarating too!

downstream_scores.suggested_follow_up: As you plan for the half marathon, what area—training, nutrition, or rest—are you most eager to focus on next?
